Package com.mps.deepviolet.util

package com.mps.deepviolet.util
  • Class
    Description
    CryptoUtils
    Encryption utilities for DeepViolet scan persistence.
    DerParser
    Lightweight ASN.1 DER parser to replace Bouncy Castle dependencies.
    DerParser.DerValue
    Represents a parsed DER value with its tag and content.
    ECCurveNames
    Static lookup table for EC curve names to replace Bouncy Castle's ECNamedCurveTable.
    FileUtils
     
    OcspClient
    OCSP client implementation using JDK classes, replacing Bouncy Castle.
    OcspClient.OcspResponse
    OCSP response details.
    OcspClient.Status
    Certificate status from OCSP check.
    X509Extensions
    X.509 extension parsing utilities to replace Bouncy Castle dependencies.
    X509Extensions.SignedCertificateTimestamp
    Represents a Signed Certificate Timestamp.
